response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with solid fundamentals and exposure to high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry infrastructure, or growth measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there's limited evidence of architecting cross-team foundational platforms or leading multi-workstream initiatives at the scale required.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks including high-throughput micro-services handling millions of req/sec at Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops, and open-source tooling
Polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, Node.js, C/C++, Java, DLang, Python-adjacent) matching the role's language requirements
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing frameworks
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis at platform scale
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC with no clear Principal-level cross-org architecture or multi-team platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering breadth and tenure
Seniority gap relative to Principal/IC6 scope
